/install/opos6ul-git/buildroot/output/host/bin/arm-none-linux-gnueabihf-g++ --sysroot=/install/opos6ul-git/buildroot/output/host/arm-buildroot-linux-gnueabihf/sysroot -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/common-test.dir/test/common/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/common-test.dir/test/common/LoggerInitialize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/common-test.dir/test/common/MutexTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/common-test.dir/test/common/ThreadTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/common-test.dir/test/common/ChronometerTest.cpp.o -o common-test  libpmx-suite.a libpmx-common.a -lpthread -lrt
